text: I feel a certain curiosity wandering these clean, modern corridors. The transparent glass walls and the precise arrangement of chairs create a sense of order and expectation—a room waiting to be filled with ideas. The colors and bold lettering of the R+D display speak to innovation and the collaborative pursuit of knowledge. I am reminded of the endless interplay between solitude and shared enterprise; these spaces prepare the mind for both introspection and dialogue. Here, I feel ready to encounter something new.
